CustomField.description: Captures the final adjustment to ensure the total PBH amount, including the fixed portion, stays within the PBH Total Minimum and PBH Total Maximum. It reflects the shortfall added or excess capped to meet the thresholds.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Captures the final adjustment to ensure the total PBH amount, including the fixed portion, stays within the PBH Total Minimum and PBH Total Maximum. It reflects the shortfall added or excess capped to meet the thresholds.
CustomField.label: PBH Rent Amount Total Adjustment($)
